title: Iran's Araghchi arrives in Islamabad Friday night ahead of possible US talks
snippet: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrives in Islamabad Friday night with a small delegation. IRNA describes visit as 'bilateral' with Pakistan, not linked to US negotiations. Sources say Araghchi may travel to Muscat then Moscow. Iranian official says possible US-Iran meeting on Monday if conditions met. Araghchi previously led Islamabad round 1 delegation.
tag_reason: New development: Araghchi physically arrives in Islamabad ahead of Witkoff/Kushner. His presence signals Iran engagement despite denials. Monday meeting possibility is new.
